should_trigger.text: Turn these alert logs and responder notes into a governed incident packet with severity rationale and owner actions.
Standardize this outage review, run severity assessment, and assemble incident communication into a reusable incident workflow.

should_not_trigger.text: Explain how severity levels are decided during incidents.
Write a single incident update for customers from these notes.

near_neighbor.text: Summarize the outage timeline, but do not package a governed workflow.
Brainstorm how incident handling could improve next quarter without building the packet.
